title: neoalsomitra timorana
intro: Neoalsomitra timorana, also known as the Timoran vine or the hairy vine, is a plant species within the Capparaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Neoalsomitra timorana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, often in combination with other medicinal plants, to harness its therapeutic properties.
